reasons: Lolita can protect Melissa from projectile pressure and front for her during siege or objective fights.
Melissa can keep attacking from safer spacing when Lolita holds the defensive line.

proof.summary: Lolita protects Melissa's firing position, while Melissa uses that safe space to keep applying Muddles-linked basic attack pressure.
worksBestWhen: Lolita stands between Melissa and enemy poke.
Melissa keeps safe spacing behind Lolita.
Melissa saves Go Away! for real dive pressure.
failureCases: Melissa wastes Go Away! before the real dive.
Lolita is forced to engage away from Melissa.

reasons: Tigreal can pull enemies together, giving Melissa easier multi-target Muddles pressure.
Melissa can free-hit after Tigreal's engage while enemies are controlled or displaced.

proof.summary: Tigreal groups enemies, and Melissa follows with linked basic attack damage from safer backline spacing.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal engages after Melissa is already in attack range.
Melissa has Muddles available before the fight starts.
The team protects Melissa from flank threats.
failureCases: Melissa is zoned by another diver during the setup.
Enemies spread out after the control ends.

reasons: Atlas can drag multiple enemies into one spot, making Melissa's Muddles placement and basic attack follow-up stronger.
Melissa can stay behind the engage and punish enemies after Atlas forces them into a bad formation.

proof.summary: Atlas creates the grouped teamfight setup, while Melissa converts it into sustained backline damage.
worksBestWhen: Atlas catches enemies while Melissa is already nearby.
Melissa has safe terrain or peel behind her.
Melissa has Muddles and attack uptime ready.
failureCases: Melissa is forced to use Go Away! defensively rather than attacking.
Enemies disengage before Melissa can link and attack.

reasons: Diggie can protect Melissa from crowd-control engage, which helps her keep attacking from the backline.
Melissa's self-peel handles melee approach while Diggie helps cover control-heavy initiation.

proof.summary: Diggie helps Melissa survive crowd-control engage so she can continue attacking from the backline.
worksBestWhen: Diggie saves anti-CC timing for the real enemy engage.
Melissa keeps Go Away! for divers and avoids early usage.
Melissa is positioned close enough to benefit from Diggie's protection.
failureCases: Diggie is baited before the main fight.
Melissa is burst before protection is active.
Enemies attack from multiple angles and split the protection value.

reasons: Floryn's global heal helps Melissa survive poke or dive damage while keeping her backline position.
Melissa benefits from sustain because she wants extended firing windows rather than short burst trades.

proof.summary: Floryn keeps Melissa healthy during siege or teamfight pressure, helping Melissa stay on the map and continue dealing sustained damage.
worksBestWhen: Floryn saves Bloom for the dive or burst window.
Melissa maintains safe spacing and does not overextend.
The team protects Melissa's firing angle.
failureCases: Melissa is one-shot before Bloom matters.
Floryn uses Bloom while Melissa is not under real threat.
